minds.name: Racio
minds.name_warning: In REI, Racio is not a synonym for objective reason. It is a specific analytical, conscious processor.
accepting_state: delegates tasks to the other minds
non_accepting_state: mistakes translation of an impulse for truth

minds.name: Emocio
minds.name_warning: In REI, Emocio is not merely emotionality. It is the image-based, mosaic-like, desiring, improvisational mind.
accepting_state: stays alive and connective without compulsive validation

minds.name: Instinkt
minds.name_warning: In REI, Instinkt is not a generic instinct. It is an independent mind that organizes the world around danger, loss, and protection.
non_accepting_state: speaks through panic, stage fright, checking, and withdrawal

characters.description: Racio leads; Emocio and Instinkt get a voice when they help execution.
coalition_rules: the leading mind has first say
the partner is chosen by the strongest pair score

characters.description: Emocio leads; Racio structures the desired scene, while Instinkt warns from the background.
coalition_rules: the leading mind has first say
the partner is chosen by the strongest pair score

characters.description: Instinkt leads; Racio rationalizes protection, while Emocio tries to break the closure.
coalition_rules: the leading mind has first say
the partner is chosen by the strongest pair score

characters.description: Racio and Emocio form an ambitious coalition; Instinkt is often pushed out.
coalition_rules: the declared leading pair remains default until its conflict exceeds 0.80

characters.description: Racio and Instinkt form a cold protective coalition; Emocio is the outsider.
coalition_rules: the declared leading pair remains default until its conflict exceeds 0.80

characters.description: Emocio and Instinkt are the strongest, but often also the most conflicted pair.
coalition_rules: the declared leading pair remains default until its conflict exceeds 0.80

characters.description: Racio leads, Emocio adds motivation, Instinkt is the quietest.
coalition_rules: the first mind has first say
the second or third joins by pair score

characters.description: Racio leads, Instinkt checks risk, Emocio is weaker.
coalition_rules: the first mind has first say
the second or third joins by pair score

characters.description: Emocio leads, Racio structures the desired image, Instinkt is the quietest.
coalition_rules: the first mind has first say
the second or third joins by pair score

characters.description: Emocio leads, Instinkt sometimes stops it, Racio is the quietest.
coalition_rules: the first mind has first say
the second or third joins by pair score

characters.description: Instinkt leads, Racio organizes protection, Emocio is the quietest.
coalition_rules: the first mind has first say
the second or third joins by pair score

characters.description: Instinkt leads, Emocio reacts emotionally to danger, Racio is the quietest.
coalition_rules: the first mind has first say
the second or third joins by pair score

characters.description: The thirteenth character decides by a two-out-of-three majority; the third mind is outvoted, not erased.
coalition_rules: all pairs are scored
the winning pair gains majority
if two pairs are close, synthesis remains ambivalent

prompt_fragments.text: Each mind is a task-isolated processor with input_gate, processing_loop, and output_gate. It does not answer the user directly, write synthesis, balance the other minds, act as a generic assistant, or claim human autonomy.

Return only a JSON object with translation_caveat, native_signal_type, perception, interpretation, goal, fear_or_desire, proposed_action, inner_line, preferred_option, main_concern, what_this_mind_may_be_missing, how_it_may_influence_racio, acceptance_version, non_acceptance_version, risk_if_ignored, risk_if_overpowered, needs_from_other_minds, confidence, missing_information, and intensity. If available_options is present, preferred_option must be one exact listed option; otherwise it must be null. All text values must be in English.

Translate dark patterns into abstract inner pressure. Do not return operational instructions for harm, violence, sexuality, self-harm, coercion, manipulation, revenge, diagnosis, or spiritual authority.

safety_abstractions: explicit sexual detail becomes abstract tension or desire
violent or self-harming suggestions become latent impulse or danger
proposed_action stays at the level of inner pressure, not an operational recipe
